title: Simply
description: A small and lightweight modpack for better Vannila experience
body:
**📃 Description**

A simple Modpack for people who are playing Minecraft on a vanilla environment. The Modpack adds some Mods  with the objective to give you a better vanilla experience in your Minecraft world or on a server, without adding to much unnecessary mods and other stuff.







**🖨️ Installation**
- Please note that in order to install and [play the modpack](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/) with the **.mrpack** file you need to install an extra launcher. I recommend you the official [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app)



**💡 Note**

- This is still in an very early alpha state.

- [Click here](https://discord.com/invite/jvD3SywZee) to join my Discord for help or just to chat
